message:
feat(benchmark): production-scale ML workloads with table format

Updated to realistic production-scale datasets:
- Feature Engineering: 100M rows (0.71s vs DuckDB 2.64s, Polars 7.11s)
- Vector Search: 1M docs x 384-dim = 1GB (13.1M docs/sec)
- Fraud Detection: 50M transactions (0.25s vs DuckDB 1.09s, Polars 7.88s)
- Recommendations: 500K items x 256-dim (22.2M items/sec)

Key improvements:
- Times displayed in seconds for realistic benchmarks
- Table format comparing LanceQL vs DuckDB vs Polars
- Polars benchmark using numpy for complex expressions
- Shows data sizes (GB/MB) for each workload
